positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed celestial mandalic pattern featuring stylized geometric flora interwoven with flowing nebula gas and ringed celestial bodies. The central motif should include abstract representations of mountains, moons, and constellations rendered in clean, contrasting silhouettes. Use a palette of deep indigo, ethereal cyan, burnt gold, and matte black. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and minimalist scientific illustration, with clean lines and strong contrast perfect for direct-to-garment printing. The composition must be balanced and visually arresting, designed for a central chest print.
